error_signature: EHOSTUNREACHABLE - The host is unreachable, perhaps the server is offline
title: Airtable API unreachable due to IPv6 configuration
symptom: When attempting to call the Airtable API from self-hosted n8n, the error 'EHOSTUNREACHABLE' occurs. Other requests work fine, indicating the issue is specific to Airtable.
applies_when: Attempting to connect to Airtable API
not_this_if: Requests to Airtable work from other environments like Postman
root_cause: The error occurs because the self-hosted n8n instance cannot reach the Airtable API due to an IPv6 configuration issue. A recent migration on the VPS turned off IPv6, which is required for the connection to succeed.
fix_steps: Configure an IPv6 address for your VPS
Ensure that the n8n instance is set to use the new IPv6 configuration
Test the connection to the Airtable API again
agent_instruction: Configure your VPS to enable IPv6 and ensure n8n uses it for API requests.
